hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); b=${f##*/}; case "$b" in .env|.env.local|.env.*.local|.env.production|.env.development) echo "Blocked: $b holds live API keys - edit it manually, not via Claude." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; exit 0

DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.js) cd "$DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; out=$(./node_modules/.bin/eslint --fix "$f" 2>&1); rc=$?; ./node_modules/.bin/prettier --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then echo "Hook ran eslint --fix + prettier on $f, but ESLint errors remain (npm run lint / CI will fail) — fix these now:" >&2; echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac; exit 0
